Now we proceed to consider the planets that become male
fics or benefics because of certain factors. Even a natural
benefic does become a malefic by owning a Kendra, or by being
in a bad house, or by association with a malefic. But a malefic
becomes a benefic by being lord of Lagna, or by occupying
Lagna, or by being owner of a Kendra (quadrant) or a Kona
(trine). The ownership of a Kona (1st, 5th, 9th houses) always
makes a planet a benefic. The ownership of houses 3rd, 6th,
8th, llthand 12th makes one a malefic. A benefic in a Kendra
(4th, 7th, lOth houses) gives good results, and a malefic there
does not act in this way.
A benefic owning the 1st and the lOth houses does not
become a malefic. This holds good for Kanya (Virgo) and
Meena (Pisces) Lagnas. A malefic in the 5th and 9th is not
generally conducive to do good. The ascendant, the sign occu
pied by the Moon, the sign having the lord of the sign occupied
